title: Front Office Manager - Elior India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Elior India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Elior India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Noida. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Elior India:
Elior India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India!
